arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Bayern-Celtic, Milan-Feyenoord
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Wednesday's Champions League action as Bayern Munich take on Celtic, AC Milan face Feyenoord and AS Monaco take on Benfica.

arts.ttl: Milan Close to Securing Christian Pulisic’s Contract Extension
arts.sum: Christian Pulisic is set to extend his stay at AC Milan, with the club and the American star reportedly reaching an agreement on a new contract. The deal will see Pulisic remain at the San Siro until 2029, with a significant salary increase that cements his status as one of the Rossoneri's most valued players. The post Milan Close to Securing Christian Pulisic’s Contract Extension appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Champions League Liveblog: Feyenoord vs. Milan and Club Brugge vs. Atalanta
Mauro Tassotti Returns to Milan Futuro to Assist Bonera Amid Relegation Crisis
arts.sum: AC Milan have taken decisive action to address the dire situation facing their Milan Futuro team, which is battling to avoid relegation to Serie D. In a significant move, the club has announced the return of Mauro Tassotti, a legendary figure in Milan's history, who will join Daniele Bonera's coaching staff to help stabilize the team and guide them out of trouble. The post Mauro Tassotti Returns to Milan Futuro to Assist Bonera Amid Relegation Crisis appeared first on FootItalia.com.
